case_title: AZZOPARDI, SAMUEL VS ACE HARDWARE (ZARAGOZA, JOSE -MANAGER)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY AZZOPARDI, SAMUEL AS TO DEFENDANT ACE HARDWARE (ZARAGOZA, JOSE -MANAGER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ACE HARDWARE (ZARAGOZA, JOSE -MANAGER)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AZZOPARDI, SAMUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ACE HARDWARE (ZARAGOZA, JOSE -MANAGER) COLE HARDWARE IS THE NAME OF THE DEFENDANT IN THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
